request.description:
```
This is a REST API that uses http method as POST and it create the new user details and add to the database/server.
curl -i \
-H "Accept: application/json" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN" \
-X POST "https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users" \
-d '{
  "name": "Tenali Ramakrishna",
  "gender": "male",
  "email": "tenali.ramakrishna@15ce.com",
  "status": "active"
}'
 

 ```

## Update User

Partially updates the details of an existing user on the [GoRest API](https://gorest.co.in). Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated — fields omitted will remain unchanged.

---

### Endpoint

```
PATCH https://gorest.co.in/public/v2/users/{userId}

 ```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `userId` | `integer` | The unique ID of the user to update (provided in the URL path) |

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a **Bearer Token** passed via the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer <your_token>

 ```

You can generate an access token from your [GoRest account](https://gorest.co.in/my-account/tokens).

---

### Request Headers

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Content-Type` | `application/json` |
| `Accept` | `application/json` |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer` |

---

### Request Body

Send a JSON object with one or more of the following fields. All fields are optional — only the provided fields will be updated.

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | Full name of the user |
| `email` | `string` | Email address of the user (must be unique) |
| `status` | `string` | Account status — `active` or `inactive` |

**Example:**

``` json
{
  "name": "Tenali Kumar",
  "email": "tenali@15ce.com",
  "status": "active"
}

 ```

---

### Expected Behavior

- Returns **`200 OK`** with the updated user object if the request is successful.
    
- Returns **`401 Unauthorized`** if the Bearer token is missing or invalid.
    
- Returns **`404 Not Found`** if no user exists with the given `userId`.
    
- Returns **`422 Unprocessable Entity`** if validation fails (e.g., duplicate email or invalid status value).
